error_signature: The file or directory does not exist
title: File or directory not found in Write Node
symptom: The Write Node fails with the message 'The file or directory does not exist' when trying to save a file downloaded via FTP.
applies_when: Using Write Node after FTP download
not_this_if: Static file names are used and work correctly
root_cause: The error occurs when the specified file path is incorrect or improperly formatted. This can happen if the path uses single backslashes instead of double backslashes or forward slashes, leading to misinterpretation of the path by the system.
fix_steps: Check the file path in the Write Node settings
Change single backslashes to double backslashes or use single forward slashes
agent_instruction: Adjust the file path format in the Write Node to use double backslashes or single forward slashes.
